offer: For medical clinics processing 5–15 patient records/month, regulatory compliance challenges cause delays in reporting. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely and accurate regulatory compliance reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical clinics with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
